text.title: spatial-ux-fundamentals Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure to apply the spatial-ux-fundamentals methodology end-to-end.

step.name: assign-field-zone
step.action: Place each in near / mid / far zone. Reject interactive controls in far field.
step.decision-gate: Reject if any interactive control in far field.

step.name: anchor-and-recenter
step.action: Anchor primary controls head-locked-with-decay or hand-attached. Add recenter affordance.

step.name: occlusion-and-sight-line
step.action: Verify no critical UI in lower 30° FoV. Confirm sight-lines unobstructed.

step.name: validate
step.action: Run validate-spatial-ux-fundamentals.py + spatial-spec-linter.py. Test on hardware in seated AND standing posture.
